basics.description:
Deploy **UTL-X Transformation Engine — Enterprise** into your Azure subscription.

**Enterprise plan:** 64 worker threads, up to 30 auto-scaling instances. Handles 100+ integrations at ~300K+ msg/s. Unlimited scaling.

Billing is handled automatically through your Azure bill.

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for all resources. Choose a region close to your workloads.

options.text: Enterprise plan: 64 concurrent worker threads, up to 30 auto-scaling instances. Full access to all features: JSON, XML, CSV, YAML, OData, 652 stdlib functions, schema validation, pipeline chaining, Dapr messaging integration. Priority support included.

elements.name: cpuCores
elements.label: CPU Cores per instance
elements.toolTip: CPU allocation per container instance. With 64 workers, 4.0 cores is recommended.

elements.name: memoryGi
elements.label: Memory per instance
elements.toolTip: Memory allocation per container instance. With 64 workers processing concurrently, 8 GB is recommended.
elements.defaultValue: 8 GB — messages up to 1 MB+ (large payloads)

allowedValues.label: 8 GB — messages up to 1 MB+ (large payloads)

elements.name: minReplicas
elements.label: Minimum instances
elements.toolTip: Set to 1+ for always-on (recommended for enterprise production).

elements.name: maxReplicas
elements.label: Maximum instances
elements.toolTip: Maximum number of instances for auto-scaling under load.

elements.name: enableDapr
elements.label: Enable Dapr sidecar for Service Bus / Event Hub messaging
elements.toolTip: Enables broker-agnostic messaging via Dapr. Requires a Service Bus or Event Hub connection string.
